2604.12320.title: EgoEsportsQA: An Egocentric Video Benchmark for Perception and Reasoning in Esports
2604.12320.paper_summary: While video large language models (Video-LLMs) excel in understanding slow-paced, real-world egocentric videos, their capabilities in high-velocity, information-dense virtual environments remain under-explored. Existing benchmarks focus on daily activities, yet lack a rigorous testbed for evaluating fast, rule-bound reasoning in virtual scenarios. To fill this gap, we introduce EgoEsportsQA, a pioneering video question-answering (QA) benchmark for grounding perception and reasoning in expert esports knowledge. We curate 1,745 high-quality QA pairs from professional matches across 3 first-person shooter games via a scalable six-stage pipeline. These questions are structured into a two-dimensional decoupled taxonomy: 11 sub-tasks in the cognitive capability dimension (covering perception and reasoning levels) and 6 sub-tasks in the esports knowledge dimension. Comprehensive evaluations of state-of-the-art Video-LLMs reveal that current models still fail to achieve satisfactory performance, with the best model only 71.58%. The results expose notable gaps across both axes: models exhibit stronger capabilities in basic visual perception than in deep tactical reasoning, and they grasp overall macro-progression better than fine-grained micro-operations. Extensive ablation experiments demonstrate the intrinsic weaknesses of current Video-LLM architectures. Further analysis suggests that our dataset not only reveals the connections between real-world and virtual egocentric domains, but also offers guidance for optimizing downstream esports applications, thereby fostering the future advancement of Video-LLMs in various egocentric environments.
2604.12320.paper_summary_zh: 儘管視頻大型語言模型（Video-LLMs）在理解緩慢節奏的現實世界自我中心視頻方面表現出色，但它們在高速、信息密集的虛擬環境中的能力仍然未被充分探索。現有的基準測試專注於日常活動，但缺乏一個嚴謹的測試平台來評估在虛擬場景中快速、遵循規則的推理。為填補這一空白，我們推出了EgoEsportsQA，這是一個開創性的視頻問答（QA）基準，用於將感知和推理與專業電子競技知識相結合。我們通過可擴展的六階段管道從三款第一人稱射擊遊戲的專業比賽中策劃了1,745對高質量的QA對。這些問題被結構化為一個二維的解耦分類法：認知能力維度中的11個子任務（涵蓋感知和推理水平）以及電子競技知識維度中的6個子任務。對最先進的Video-LLMs的全面評估顯示，當前模型仍未能達到令人滿意的性能，最佳模型僅為71.58%。結果揭示了兩個維度之間的顯著差距：模型在基本視覺感知方面的能力強於深層戰術推理，並且在整體宏觀進展的理解上優於細緻的微觀操作。廣泛的消融實驗顯示了當前Video-LLM架構的內在弱點。進一步分析表明，我們的數據集不僅揭示了現實世界和虛擬自我中心領域之間的聯繫，還為優化下游電子競技應用提供了指導，從而促進Video-LLMs在各種自我中心環境中的未來發展。
2604.12320.author: Jianzhe Ma et.al.
2604.12320.authors: Jianzhe Ma, Zhonghao Cao, Shangkui Chen, Yichen Xu, Wenxuan Wang, Qin Jin
